summary:
Glycopyrrolate is frequently utilized as a pre-anesthetic medication due to its effectiveness in inhibiting saliva and respiratory secretions before anesthesia. It stands out over alternatives like atropine or scopolamine because of quicker onset and more potent action against sialogogues.
```

-Agent1
```
